allow: Bash(python3 -c "import pdfplumber; pdf = pdfplumber.open\('C:/Second Brain/raw/The Lean Startup - Erick Ries.pdf'\); print\(len\(pdf.pages\), 'pages'\); [print\(f'--- p{i+1} ---'\); print\(pdf.pages[i].extract_text\(\)[:1500]\) for i in range\(min\(5, len\(pdf.pages\)\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import PyPDF2; r=PyPDF2.PdfReader\('C:/Second Brain/raw/The Lean Startup - Erick Ries.pdf'\); print\(len\(r.pages\),'pages'\); [print\(r.pages[i].extract_text\(\)[:1500]\) for i in range\(min\(5,len\(r.pages\)\)\)]")
